title: Mag 7 value shrinks by $2.3 trillion amid AI spending jitters — but investors are still backing chipmakers
summary_full: Investors are growing jittery about massive AI spending by the Mag 7 and when these companies will produce a return on that investment.
summary_public: Investors are growing jittery about massive AI spending by the Mag 7 and when these companies will produce a return on that investment.
